---
title: Get Started
subtitle: This blog records that my personal website was launched on Dec-08-2023.
description: |
  This is my first blog on my website. I hope you like my website and can learn something from it. 
categories:
  - Daily
author: Hao Sun
date: "12/08/2023"
image: "firework.jpeg"
image-alt: "Fireworks with a silhouette of an audience"
---

Hello World!
